meaning: vt.使隔离,使孤立,使绝缘,离析n.隔离种群
examples: Researchers are still trying to isolate the gene that causes this abnormality.
This policy could isolate the country from the other permanent members of the United Nations Security Council.
Element 43's radioactivity makes it easy to isolate and measure.
Governments are finding it almost impossible to monitor, let alone isolate, so many sources of infection.
Among our most benign experiments are those with people who voluntarily isolate themselves for extended periods.
